changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Record OE's own receive-time clock for a staged analyzer result, distinct from complete_date (which stays derived from the analyzer's onboard clock, unchanged). The real MAGLUMI X3 bench clock was found ~16 months wrong (LIS-271); complete_date alone can't reveal that, so import_received_time gives every row a truthful second timestamp to compare against. Null on rows written before this migration.
